docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HEGARTY, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A-ONE CAR RENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A-ONE CAR RENTAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEGARTY, PATRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALDMAN, MICHAEL C/O A-ONE CAR RENTAL $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $346.00, DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT WALDMAN, MICHAEL. DEFT ONE RENT-A-CAR, IS PROPER DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
